summary: Tested Reference Normalization feature for AJPL Calculator. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend edit reference UI works correctly for admin users - edit icon visible, dropdown with reference options, save/cancel buttons, success toast, and change log entry. Non-admin users correctly cannot access the PUT /api/bills/{bill_id}/reference endpoint (403).

issues: Console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' - minor React hydration warning in dropdown rendering

passed_tests: PUT /api/bills/{bill_id}/reference - admin can update bill reference without changing status
PUT /api/bills/{bill_id}/reference - reference normalized to title case (e.g., 'walk-in' -> 'Walk-In')
PUT /api/bills/{bill_id}/reference - change logged in change_log with action='reference_update'
POST /api/admin/normalize-references - normalizes all existing references in bills and customers
POST /api/admin/normalize-references - requires admin role (403 for non-admin)
POST /api/customers - normalizes reference at creation time
POST /api/bills - normalizes customer_reference at creation time
Frontend: Edit reference icon visible for admin users on BillPage
Frontend: Clicking edit icon shows dropdown with REFERENCE_OPTIONS
Frontend: Save button updates reference and shows success toast
Frontend: Cancel button closes edit mode without saving
Frontend: Change log shows 'Reference_update' entry after save
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: BillPage.js line 305 - React hydration warning about <span> inside <option>. The REFERENCE_OPTIONS.map() renders options correctly but there may be a wrapper span causing the warning. Low priority fix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reference Normalization feature fully tested. Key endpoints: PUT /api/bills/{bill_id}/reference (admin-only, updates reference without changing bill status), POST /api/admin/normalize-references (one-time cleanup). normalize_reference() function at server.py line 37 converts to title case with trimming. Frontend BillPage.js shows edit icon only for admin users (isAdmin check at line 317). REFERENCE_OPTIONS array at line 31 contains: Instagram, Facebook, Friends, Family, Repeat Customer, Walk-in, Google, Newspaper, TV, Other. OTP delivery is MOCKED - visible via GET /api/admin/pending-otps.

endpoints_tested.notes: Admin-only, normalizes to title case, logs to change_log

security_tested: Frontend hides edit button for non-admin users (isAdmin check)

mocked_apis.OTP_delivery: OTP codes visible via GET /api/admin/pending-otps instead of actual SMS delivery
